raw_consumer_statement:
GoDaddy.com AI system charged me {$330.00} three times on XXXX XXXX 2024. 
I filed a dispute with American Express Business Card online customer service system. 
I received a credit for {$330.00}. The problem there are two more {$330.00} charges on my balance. Producing a overcharge {$670.00}. GoDaddy.com has corrected their billing. I notice the situation during annual account review. 
For some reason when calling XXXX I receive AI prompts that can not address the issues. Request CFPB find a real person and credit my credit card account. 
XXXX XXXX 2024 XXXX XXXX XXXX account. I requested discontinue paying XXXX I am still being charged.
